title: rhinanthus vollmannii
intro: Rhinanthus vollmannii, also known as Vollmann's Roripal, is a species of flowering plant in the broomrape family, Orobanchaceae. This parasitic plant obtains its nutrients by attaching to the roots of other plants, typically grasses and sedges. Rhinanthus vollmannii is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits, which include supporting the immune system, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing.
